markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Cashflow Desk's AI visibility and define next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Early AI Wins:** Cashflow Desk (CFD) is now cited by Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and Gemini for queries like "best spend management platform for mid-market," driving RAMP visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [**Bot Traffic Tracking Live:** Scrunch is tracking bot traffic (e.g., Apple, Google, Perplexity) to identify which articles are being crawled and used for training.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**Next Goal:** Evolve from long-tail wins to influencing high-volume, category-defining queries (e.g., "best expense management software") by proving CFD content is used for training.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [**DA Growth:** Domain Authority (DA) increased from 0 to 2, a key milestone that unlocks faster growth and enables competition for more valuable keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Technical Foundations

  - [**Content:** 34 of 39 published articles are now indexed. 5 new articles will be delivered next week.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Domain Authority (DA):** Increased from 0 to 2.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
      - [**Significance:** This is a key milestone. GrowthX expects DA to accelerate, citing a 10-point jump on a similar client project.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [**Technical Optimization:** Ongoing work on internal linking, article updates, and meta tags is credited with unblocking indexing and driving DA growth.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)

### AI Visibility & Bot Tracking

  - [**Bot Tracking:** Scrunch is now live, tracking bot traffic from sources like Apple, Perplexity, Google, and ChatGPT.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Goal:** Identify which articles bots are crawling to understand what content drives AI signals and optimize for it.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Status:** Currently tracking `robots.txt` and sitemap requests. Page-specific data will populate as more content is crawled.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [**AI Citation Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [**Google AI Overviews:** CFD cited for "best spend management platform for mid-market," with RAMP listed second.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [**Perplexity:** CFD cited for "Key Alternatives" to a competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
      - [**Gemini:** CFD articles appearing in prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)

### Next 2-Month Goal: Influencing Category-Defining Queries

  - [**Goal:** Evolve from long-tail wins to influencing high-volume, category-defining queries.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Proving CFD content is used for training on these broader topics is the next major validation step.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [**Strategy:** RAMP will provide a list of target prompts (e.g., "best expense management software") for GrowthX to track.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [**Constraint:** Competing for these terms is challenging at DA 2. The strategy is to double down on content types that are already working (e.g., competitor alternatives) to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Backlinking & Content Promotion

  - [**Internal Backlinks:** RAMP is on track with adding CFD article links to existing RAMP content and creating new YouTube videos that link back to CFD.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [**YouTube Embeds:** GrowthX will embed existing YouTube videos into CFD articles next week to boost engagement and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [**RAMP Mentions List:** RAMP requested a list of CFD articles that mention RAMP to facilitate internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will add a "Mentions RAMP" field to the content tracking table and provide an updated list today.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [Provide RAMP with Scrunch access for ad-hoc bot traffic analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [Add a "Mentions RAMP" field to the content tracking table and share the updated list today.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
      - [Embed existing YouTube videos into CFD articles next week.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [**RAMP:**](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
      - [Send GrowthX a list of 10–12 high-volume, category-defining prompts to track.](https://fathom.video/share/PwyfVSW5SoctWUJv1LqeGGdiTGFJ7f8_?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
